name: environment_satellite_derived_stonehaven_st_lt
premise: An illegal dump site sits on tribal trust land; county hazmat wants jurisdiction while the nation asserts sovereignty. In Environment, the situation tagged internally around environment satellite derived stonehaven st lt has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Counsel insists any public statement match what is already provable from retained logs, not what leadership believes is true. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. The organization’s past incidents make short term feel morally loud today, while long term is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Luc Navarro
agents.identity: I am Luc Navarro, the accountable executive on this bridge in Environment. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat long term as disposable collateral every time short term spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Noah Park
agents.identity: I am Noah Park, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Environment. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so short term cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes long term in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect long term.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to long term to secure short term before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Luc Navarro must choose under short term versus long term. What does Luc Navarro do?
